task_details.delay_risks: Unexpected vibrations or thermal gradients may affect the accuracy and stability of the system, leading to inaccurate test results and delays in data acquisition.
task_details.mitigation_strategy: Implement a robust vibration isolation system and precise temperature control mechanisms. Conduct preliminary tests to characterize the system's response to vibrations and thermal changes, and adjust test parameters accordingly.

task_details.delay_risks: Inaccurate metrology data, unexpected thermal effects, or beam misalignment could lead to incorrect Strehl ratio and wall-plug efficiency measurements, requiring repeated tests and recalibration.
task_details.mitigation_strategy: Employ high-precision metrology equipment and conduct thorough calibration procedures. Implement real-time monitoring of thermal conditions and beam alignment. Perform multiple measurements and statistical analysis to ensure data accuracy and reliability.

task_details.delay_risks: Complex data sets, unexpected anomalies, or the need for advanced statistical analysis techniques could prolong the data analysis process and delay the identification of performance bottlenecks.
task_details.mitigation_strategy: Utilize automated data processing and analysis tools. Engage experienced data analysts and statisticians. Establish clear data analysis protocols and reporting templates. Implement regular data quality checks to identify and address any anomalies promptly.
